name: penpot-core-skills
description: Centralized agentic design skills for Penpot and the Penpot MCP: token/library foundation, component variants, screen building (from brief and from code), accessibility and token-governance audits, design-to-code review, handoff documentation, DESIGN.md extraction, Figma migration, semantic renaming, and a router. Grounded in the real Penpot MCP surface (4 core tools, plus import_image in local mode).

skills.name: penpot-router
skills.description: Thin dispatcher: route any Penpot request to exactly one skill or workflow.

skills.name: penpot-foundations
skills.description: Token + library foundation: primitive/semantic/component tiers, themes, infer-from-design.

skills.name: penpot-component-factory
skills.description: Components with complete, tokenized variant matrices and all interactive states.

skills.name: penpot-build-screen
skills.description: Design production-grade screens from a brief, reusing the system, section by section.

skills.name: penpot-build-from-code
skills.description: Translate app code/pages into an on-system Penpot screen bound to tokens.

skills.name: penpot-document-handoff
skills.description: Document a design for handoff: a hideable annotation layer beside the design (context card, numbered pins, matching observation notes, tooltips), reusing or creating an annotation component kit + tokens.

skills.name: penpot-audit-accessibility
skills.description: WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA audit: contrast, target size, semantics, focus order.

skills.name: penpot-audit-tokens
skills.description: Token governance audit: hardcoded values, off-grid spacing, orphan/duplicate tokens.

skills.name: penpot-design-to-code-review
skills.description: Extract Penpot markup/style and report drift vs source component/Storybook.

skills.name: penpot-migrate
skills.description: Figma -> Penpot migration via an intermediate representation: Auto Layout->flex, Variables->tokens, sets->variants.

skills.name: penpot-rename-layers
skills.description: Rename layers to semantic HTML names; precondition for audits and code review.

skills.name: penpot-design-md
skills.description: Extract a portable DESIGN.md spec from the file's real tokens, assets and sampled components. Read-only; writes one local markdown file.
